title: pterospermum xylocarpum
intro: Pterospermum xylocarpum, also known as the karanja or pili, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Pterospermum xylocarpum include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
